name: FALLEN: FATAL FORCE
short_description: "Seize your hidden power. Face your fate." FALLEN: FATAL FORCE is a high-intensity psychic action-adventure where gifted protagonists awaken to mysterious powers and fight to escape a secret facility. Unleash telekinesis, flight, and teleportation to overcome enemies and solve puzzles.
detailed_description:
【FALLEN】 Streaming Guidelines

FALLEN: FATAL FORCE Streaming Guidelines (English Version)

1. Introduction

Thank you for playing and sharing FALLEN: FATAL FORCE.
These guidelines are designed to ensure that everyone can enjoy streaming and sharing content related to our game safely and respectfully.

2. Streaming and Video Uploads

  • You are welcome to stream, upload gameplay videos, or share clips of FALLEN: FATAL FORCE, whether for personal or monetized purposes.

  • However, you must include the link to our official Steam store page in the description or notes section of your content.

FALLEN: FATAL FORCE Steam Store Page

3. Prohibited Uses

The following actions are not allowed:

  • Using the game in ways that violate laws or public order

  • Modifying or tampering with the game data for unauthorized purposes

  • Selling videos or streams as paid products
    (Note: Monetization through ads, Super Chats, or similar common streaming income is perfectly fine.)

4. Copyright Notice

Please include the following copyright statement in your video credits, description, or notes:

© 2025 GOOFEES. All rights reserved.

5. Additional Notes

  • These guidelines are subject to change without notice. Please check our official website or social channels for the latest updates.

  • For inquiries about streaming or these guidelines, please contact our official support team.


About the Game

Title Update & Major Overhaul Incoming!

FALLEN is evolving — with the upcoming PlayStation 5 release in 2026, the game will officially become FALLEN: FATAL FORCE.
The new title better captures the game’s intense psychic action and dark sci-fi world.

But this isn’t just a name change — it’s a full-scale upgrade that takes the experience to the next level.

🔥 What’s New

  • Telekinesis Auto-Aim: Objects you throw with psychic power now lock onto nearby enemies automatically — fast, fluid, and satisfying combat!

  • Redesigned Interface: A brand-new UI that’s more intuitive and perfectly fits the world of FALLEN.

  • Smarter Enemies: Tweaked and refined enemy behavior for more natural and thrilling encounters.

  • Japanese Voice-Over Added: By popular demand! Enjoy expressive performances from a talented cast of young voice actors bringing the story to life.

The evolution of FALLEN begins now — get ready for FATAL FORCE.

In "FALLEN: FATAL FORCE." players delve into the gripping narrative of high school students who awaken extraordinary abilities after encountering extraterrestrial beings. Trapped within the confines of a mysterious research facility, they must strategize and utilize their diverse array of powers to orchestrate their escape. Immerse yourself in thrilling combat sequences and intricate puzzle-solving challenges that stimulate both intellect and adrenaline.

engaging Features

Dynamic Supernatural Abilities: Unleash a spectrum of supernatural powers, each with its own unique strengths and strategies. Whether it's telekinesis, levitation, or teleportation, harness these abilities to overcome obstacles and adversaries.

Intense Combat Sequences: Engage in adrenaline-fueled battles against enemies. Experiment with different combinations of powers to devise winning tactics and emerge victorious in intense showdowns.

Intriguing Puzzle Solving: Exercise your intellect as you navigate through the labyrinthine corridors of the research facility. Utilize your powers creatively to solve intricate puzzles and unlock new areas, revealing the secrets hidden within.

Immersive Storyline: Experience a captivating narrative filled with twists, turns, and unexpected revelations. Unravel the mysteries behind the research facility and uncover the truth about the extraterrestrial encounter that changed everything.

Strategic Decision-Making: Every choice you make influences the outcome of your journey. Navigate moral dilemmas and strategic crossroads that shape the fate of not only the characters but the entire world.

Visually Stunning Environments: Explore richly detailed environments that blend futuristic technology with eerie, atmospheric elements. From dimly lit corridors to expansive alien landscapes, immerse yourself in a world that's as visually stunning as it is immersive.

Embark on an unforgettable journey filled with action, intrigue, and the limitless power of the mind in "FALLEN: FATAL FORCE." Are you ready to awaken your true potential and escape the clutches of the unknown?

supported_languages:
English*, Japanese*, Korean, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese
*languages with full audio support
